hyperedges.label: Project Session Handoff and State Tracking
JS Engine Integration and Event Loop
ES Module Execution and API Verification

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-22 08:25
nodes.rationale: Rebase gradient branch instead of adding a new fix commit because root fix already existed in main; Push #89 box-shadow to bottom of Priority 2 as Flexbox has higher visual impact.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-22 08:52
nodes.rationale: Project-local developer.md duplicates global because there is no inheritance in agent MD files; Screenshot step added to browser-cli-reviewer because visual bugs were missed by CLI text output; Kill stale containers before daemon start to avoid port 7070 conflicts.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-23 12:52
nodes.rationale: Do not stage .agents/PRIORITY.md because it was unrelated dirty state before merge; Create issue #119 even though fixes were implemented to keep findings documented independently; Keep pushState/replaceState non-throwing when no usable base URL exists for better compatibility with libraries expecting API presence.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-23 17:34
nodes.rationale: Keep console state outside per-frame actor round-trip because polling path introduced visible UI slowdown; Replace tiled compositor with surface compositor because rendering dominated page load times by a large margin; Leave #121 open after merging #107 for visual/polish validation.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 16:57
nodes.rationale:
Keep #103 open as umbrella to track overall Google fidelity; Fix headless image loading in engine, not just GUI polling, so daemon/reviewers see the same output; Treat
explicitly in inline flow as Google search controls depend on forced line breaks.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 17:44
nodes.rationale: Treat float overflow as layout sizing bug rather than compositor bug; Use post-layout tightening for floated auto-width boxes; Verify with fresh daemon after killing stale containers to prevent misleading results.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 20:24
nodes.rationale: Treat #126 as layout sizing bug, not compositor-only; Use shrink-to-fit plus post-layout width tightening for auto-width floats; Mark #126 done after live screenshot verification; Sync #107 and #108 from GitHub closed state; Treat #125 as next open ready issue.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 21:10
nodes.rationale:
Ship #125 and #126 together in one PR since diff spanned both fixes; Treat centered footer grouping as generic inline-layout bug so text-align doesn't center inline elements; Extend
handling rather than hardcoding spacing; Mark issues done in roadmap before merge; Treat next issue as none.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 22:11
nodes.rationale: Clamp rounded-corner radius in the renderer instead of adding a Google-specific exception to prevent self-intersection; Leave priority file unchanged during update-priority since no closed issues were missing; Keep #134 as in progress since it is still open on GitHub; Treat #133 as top open ready issue.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-04-24 22:49
nodes.rationale: Treat size-jitter as separate runtime stability issue (#137) rather than a Google-specific layout bug; Create #137 instead of folding into #133; Keep #137 in new section before DevTools; Leave metadata changes uncommitted during PR creation.

nodes.label: Handoff 2026-06-10 11:36
nodes.rationale: Proxy traps in JS live collections to avoid Sizzle/jQuery crash due to key enumeration; Run 5 RAF ticks on page load to ensure React 18 Concurrent Mode scheduler fires; Bound Naver control requests to keep daemon control API responsive.

nodes.label: Latest Handoff Summary
nodes.rationale: Proxy traps in JS live collections to avoid Sizzle/jQuery crash due to key enumeration; Run 5 RAF ticks on page load to ensure React 18 Concurrent Mode scheduler fires; Bound Naver control requests to keep daemon control API responsive.

nodes.label: Handoff session 2026-04-14
nodes.rationale: Daemon owns GUI as in-process module to avoid HTTP overhead; CLI is HTTP-only client to keep it thin; axum chosen for HTTP server due to existing tokio dependency; Issues #68-#72 raised to Priority 0 as foundational infrastructure; Daemon auto-starts GUI on launch unless --no-gui is provided.

nodes.label: Handoff session 2026-04-15
nodes.rationale: Squash merge PR #76 to keep main history clean; Force-with-lease push before merge due to branch divergence after daemon PR #75 merge; skipped committing storage.json as it was key reorder with no semantic change.

nodes.label: DaemonClient::navigate
nodes.rationale: Reqwest 0.13 (hyper 1.0) reports 'server closed connection before sending response' (caused by V8 isolate thread panic) as 'error decoding response body' instead of HTTP 500 error.

nodes.label: Naver homepage rendering
nodes.rationale: Naver homepage loads dynamic module scripts and cross-origin classic scripts, which require implementing dynamic module support, URL helpers on HTMLAnchorElement, currentScript and DOM attribute stubs, postMessage, RAF queue draining, and CORS bypass.

nodes.label: Prevent Naver daemon hang
nodes.rationale: Since the engine actor is single-threaded, long JS work blocks the control endpoints. Adding bounded waits to EngineHandle methods and capping JS tick work ensures endpoints like /status and /screenshot remain responsive.

nodes.label: 2026-06-09 — Fix HTMLCollection and StyleSheetList Proxy Keys Plan
nodes.norm_label: 2026-06-09 — fix htmlcollection and stylesheetlist proxy keys plan

nodes.label: HTMLCollection & StyleSheetList Proxy Keys Fix
nodes.rationale: Hide internal properties like _resolver from key iterations to avoid crashing libraries like jQuery/Sizzle.

nodes.label: 2026-06-09 — Fix HTMLCollection Proxy Traps and getAttribute/removeAttribute TypeError Plan
nodes.norm_label: 2026-06-09 — fix htmlcollection proxy traps and getattribute/removeattribute typeerror plan

nodes.label: HTMLCollection Proxy Traps Fix
nodes.rationale: Correct string/number checks in has/get traps and reference target._items().length instead of target.length to allow Sizzle isArraylike checks.

nodes.label: ES Module Verification Details
nodes.rationale: End-to-end confirmation that inline/external module compilation, instantiation, evaluation, and lifecycle events under V8 function as expected.

nodes.label: V8 Migration and JavaScript Compatibility Matrix
nodes.norm_label: v8 migration and javascript compatibility matrix

nodes.label: Boa-to-V8 Migration Matrix
nodes.rationale: Mapping and tracking the transition from Boa engine to V8 engine, establishing the boundary between V8 runtime work and JS/Web API compatibility.

nodes.label: Tokscale Token Report 063222
nodes.rationale: Model session count, tokens (cache read, cache write, input, output), and cost statistics by provider (anthropic, google, openai).

nodes.label: Tokscale Token Report 100907
nodes.rationale: Updates to token cost statistics showing increased Gemini model session counts and total costs.

nodes.label: High-Level Architecture Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Phased browser development spanning network client, HTML/CSS parsing, DOM, styling, layout, rendering, UI, and JS integration.

nodes.label: List, Table, and Interactive Inputs Plan
nodes.norm_label: list, table, and interactive inputs plan

nodes.label: List & Table Layout Model
nodes.rationale: Support bullet rendering for lists, simple grid divisions for tables, and egui input overlays for text fields.

nodes.label: Precise Hit Testing & Link Resolution
nodes.rationale: Correct inline bounding box calculation for links to encompass children, and adjust scroll offset mapping during click handling.

nodes.label: Inline & Block Flow Layout Model
nodes.rationale: Support horizontal placement of inline elements and vertical stacking of block elements with line-break checks.

nodes.label: Aura Browser Future Roadmap Goals
nodes.rationale: Long-term strategy for graphics/media (image caching, SVG), layout (Flexbox, z-index), JS (Boa engine embedding, DOM bindings), browser UI, and parallel/sandboxed security.

nodes.label: High-Fidelity Rendering & Composition Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Implement stacking context painter order, display lists (PaintCommand enum), compositor layer textures, dirty rect damage tracking, and filters.

nodes.label: HTML & CSS Engine Perfection Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: html & css engine perfection plan doc

nodes.label: HTML & CSS Performance Optimization
nodes.rationale: Solve OOM issues and fetch blockages via parallel stylesheet fetching, style tree string interning (COW PropertyMaps), right-to-left CSS matches, and non-recursive layouts.

nodes.label: Inline-Block Layout System Refinement Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: inline-block layout system refinement plan doc

nodes.label: Inline-Block Flow Model
nodes.rationale: Refine IFC formatting contexts, tracking line height max values, and executing line wrapping algorithms.

nodes.label: Interaction, Links, and JS Engine Integration Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: interaction, links, and js engine integration plan doc

nodes.label: JS Engine Integration Strategy
nodes.rationale: Assess pure-Rust Boa engine embedding, QuickJS C-bindings, and rusty_v8, outlining DOM bridge and event handling steps.

nodes.label: Interaction and Navigation Coordinates Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: interaction and navigation coordinates plan doc

nodes.label: Interactive Coordinate Correction
nodes.rationale: Apply explicit pointer pos from egui response to resolve scroll offsets and update inline box height propagation.

nodes.label: Flexbox Layout Implementation
nodes.rationale: Detail multi-step flex algorithm including axis identification, line wrapping, space distribution, alignment, and justification.

nodes.label: Native Fetch API & JS Promise Bridge Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: native fetch api & js promise bridge plan doc

nodes.label: Fetch API & JS Promise Bridge
nodes.rationale: Integrate Native fetch thread with main JS thread channel-based task queues and resolve promises with Response objects.

nodes.label: Combinator and Attribute Matching Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: combinator and attribute matching plan doc

nodes.label: CSS Selector Combinator & Attribute Matching
nodes.rationale: Add matching for attributes ([attr], [attr=val]) and combinators (child >, descendant, sibling +, subsequent ~).

nodes.label: Hover Pseudo-class Selection
nodes.rationale: Support :hover pseudo-class matching by passing hovered_id to matches_selector and triggering re-renders on hover changes.

nodes.label: IFC Line-Box Engine Refinement Plan Doc
nodes.norm_label: ifc line-box engine refinement plan doc

nodes.label: IFC Line-Box Stacking & Alignment
nodes.rationale: Refine IFC to support line stacking metrics (ascent, descent), vertical alignment (baseline, top, middle, bottom), and standard space collapsing.
